_note: Canonical machine-readable pins for the kit's DEFAULT operator tools (ADR-20260612). Single source of truth read by setup/install-external-tools.{ps1,sh}; the human lifecycle, rationale, and gotchas live in setup/EXTERNAL-TOOLS.md. DEFAULT != gate: absence degrades, never blocks. Version-forward ONLY via PR to this file with evidence the new version was exercised on a real machine.

tools.name: graphify
tools.role: structural code navigation / local semantic memory (hubs, dead-code, 'what touches X') before blind grep

tools.name: rtk
tools.role: local compression of noisy shell output (builds, tests, logs) — agent token economy
